title: Positions — Monologue
description: Listen, then prove you were listening

_voiceScript.script:
Sara: Omar, čo hľadáš?
Omar: Hľadám svoje kľúče. Neviem, kde sú.
Sara: Pozri, či sú na stole. Sú tam?
Omar: Nie, na stole nie sú.
Sara: A pod stolom? Alebo za pohovkou?
Omar: Moment... Áno! Sú za pohovkou!
Sara: Výborne. Čo ešte hľadáš?
Omar: Hľadám aj pas. Je v kufri?
Sara: Kufor je vonku, pred dverami.
Omar: Nie, pas nie je vonku. Je niekde vnútri.
Sara: Pozri hore. Je na poličke nad stolom?
Omar: Áno! Pas je hore na poličke!
Sara: A doklady sú v zásuvke, medzi zápisníkmi.
Omar: Nájdem ich. Ďakujem, Sara!
Sara: Niet za čo. Teraz máš všetko!

exercises.instruction: Tap every word or expression you heard in the conversation.

questions.questionEn: Omar finds his keys. Where does he say they are?
questions.answerMeaning: Sú za pohovkou! = They are behind the sofa! Za = behind. Pohovka = sofa.

questions.questionEn: Sara tells Omar where the suitcase is. What does she say?
questions.answerMeaning: Kufor je vonku, pred dverami. = The suitcase is outside, in front of the door. Vonku = outside, pred = in front of.

reviewPair.english: outside, in front of the door

questions.questionEn: Omar is looking for two things. What are they?
questions.answerMeaning: Omar says Hľadám svoje kľúče and then Hľadám aj pas. Kľúče = keys, pas = passport.

questions.questionEn: Where does Sara suggest Omar look first for the keys?
questions.answerMeaning: Sara says Pozri, či sú na stole. = Check if they are on the table. Na stole = on the table.

questions.questionEn: Where does Omar find his passport?

answers.textEn: On the shelf above the table
In the drawer between the notebooks

questions.answerMeaning: Pas je hore na poličke. The shelf is nad stolom = above the table. Hore = up/above.

reviewPair.english: on the shelf above the table

answers.textEn: On the shelf above the table
In the drawer between the notebooks

questions.answerMeaning: A doklady sú v zásuvke, medzi zápisníkmi. = The documents are in the drawer, between the notebooks. V zásuvke = in the drawer, medzi = between.

reviewPair.english: in the drawer, between the notebooks

sentences.promptEn: I am looking for my keys. I don't know where they are.
The suitcase is outside, in front of the door.
The passport is not outside. It is somewhere inside.
Look up. Is it on the shelf above the table?
The documents are in the drawer, between the notebooks.
